scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @lilac/config && npm run build -w @lilac/core && npm run build -w @lilac/proof && npm run build -w @lilac/db && npm run build -w @lilac/discord-ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @lilac/bot && npm run build -w @lilac/worker && npm run build -w @lilac/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w @lilac/bot && npm run typecheck -w @lilac/worker && npm run typecheck -w @lilac/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
